arts.ttl: Thiago Motta wants Fikayo Tomori at Juventus
arts.sum: Juventus have identified Fikayo Tomori as one of their top targets to strengthen their defensive line. The English defender has caught the attention of Juventus manager Thiago Motta, who has explicitly requested his acquisition. The post Thiago Motta wants Fikayo Tomori at Juventus appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Milan eyeing Lorenzo Lucca: Agent proposes striker to club
arts.sum: As the January transfer window approaches, Lorenzo Lucca has emerged as one of Serie A's standout performers, catching the attention of Italy's top clubs. The Udinese striker has been in impressive form, netting 7 goals in 18 league appearances and an additional 2 in the Coppa Italia. The post Milan eyeing Lorenzo Lucca: Agent proposes striker to club appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Cafu: ‘Emerson Royal? He’s strong, but don’t compare him to me…’
arts.sum: Former Roma and Milan full-back Marcos Cafu previewed the match between his two former sides this evening. The Rossoneri and Giallorossi face off at San Siro, in what is a bit of a derby of the heart for the Brazilian. Six seasons in the capital from 1997 to 2003, five in Milan from 2003 to 2008. "Unforgettable years," sighs the former full-back while speaking with Gazzetta dello Sport. The post Cafu: ‘Emerson Royal? He’s strong, but don’t compare him to me…’ appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Juventus and Milan explore potential Tomori-Fagioli swap deal
arts.sum: The January transfer window is heating up with rumours of a possible exchange between Juventus and AC Milan involving Fikayo Tomori and Nicolò Fagioli. This potential deal has emerged as a topic of discussion, addressing the needs of both clubs while potentially solving multiple issues at once.
